seed_data.title: Ceramide Skin Barrier Moisturizer
seed_data.description:
The COSRX Ceramide Skin Barrier Moisturizer delivers deep, lasting hydration while soothing and strengthening sensitive or compromised skin. The rich yet soft texture absorbs easily and leaves skin comforted, supple, and calm—never greasy or sticky.

Powered by a blend of seven ceramides, cholesterol, and fatty acids, it helps reinforce the skin barrier and improve its ability to retain moisture against dryness and external stress. Five types of hyaluronic acid and squalane infuse skin with long-lasting hydration, while panthenol helps relieve sensitivity and irritation. With just one use, skin stays hydrated for over 200 hours and feels smoother, softer, and more supple.

Ideal for all skin types, especially dry or sensitive skin, this nourishing cream restores strength, comfort, and hydration so your skin looks healthy, balanced, and naturally glowing.

2.7 oz/ 80 mL

seed_data.title: The 6 Peptide Skin Booster Serum
seed_data.description:
A lightweight, first-step serum that helps bring skin back into balance. This water-like formula is infused with six targeted peptides that work together to smooth fine lines, minimize the look of pores, and improve texture and tone for visibly clearer, firmer-looking skin.

Each peptide supports specific skin needs—helping to boost elasticity, refine uneven texture, balance oil, calm redness, and strengthen the moisture barrier. The toner-like texture absorbs quickly without stickiness, delivering lightweight hydration and preparing skin to better absorb the rest of your routine.

With daily use, skin feels smoother, looks brighter, and appears more refined over time.

150 mL/5.07 fl. oz.

seed_row.title: Low pH Niacinamide Micellar Cleansing Water

seed_data.title: Low pH Niacinamide Micellar Cleansing Water
seed_data.description:
If you want a cleanser that removes makeup without upsetting your skin, this gentle micellar water does it all. The COSRX Low pH Niacinamide Micellar Cleansing Water lifts away longwear makeup, sunscreen, and impurities while maintaining skin’s natural balance. Its low pH formula helps keep the skin barrier strong and healthy, leaving your complexion fresh, clean, and hydrated instead of tight or dry.

Formulated with niacinamide and zinc PCA, it helps control excess sebum and calm acne-prone or sensitive skin, while soothing ingredients like allantoin, panthenol, and madecassoside reduce irritation and support a healthy moisture barrier. The lightweight, refreshing texture makes it ideal for daily use—whether as your morning cleanse, makeup remover, or one-step cleanse on minimal makeup days.

This all-in-one cleansing water purifies without stripping, so your skin feels balanced, clear, and comfortably clean after every use.

400 mL/ 13.52 fl.oz

seed_data.title: Alpha-Arbutin 2 Discoloration Care Serum
seed_data.description:
Target and reduce hyperpigmentation with this high-potency serum, formulated with Alpha Arbutin, Tranexamic Acid, and Niacinamide.

This powerful combination works at every stage of discoloration, helping to brighten dark spots and even skin tone. While addressing pigmentation, the serum also soothes irritation and delivers essential hydration, leaving your skin smooth, balanced, and visibly brighter. Perfect for those seeking a more even complexion and reduced signs of hyperpigmentation.

1.69 fl. oz. / 50ml

seed_data.title: Low-pH Good Morning Gel Cleanser
seed_data.description:
Dreaming of a tighter, more luminous complexion? Make that dream a reality with Low PH Good Morning Gel Cleanser from COSRX. Crafted with tea tree and beta hydroxy acids, this mild cleanser works to reduce the look of large pores and helps control oil production. 

Cleanse daily with this gentle and effective gel type cleanser day and night, removing impurities while strengthening your skin barrier. Following your skin's slightly acidic natural pH level, this cleanser helps balance your skin and protect it from trouble-causing irritants. Great for all skin types! 

pH 5.3~1.0. Cruelty-free. Formulated without parabens, sulfates, artificial colors and fragrances, animal products, alcohol, mineral oil, and silicone. 

5.07 fl.oz/150ml

seed_data.title: Advanced Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence
seed_data.description:
Like a multivitamin for your skin, COSRX Advanced Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence helps to nourish, repair, and plump the skin with moisture. Formulated with 96.3% Snail Secretion Filtrate, this essence repairs and rejuvenates the skin from dryness and aging. It improves skin vitality by reducing dullness and soothing dehydrated skin. This lightweight essence fastly absorbs into the skin and gives you a natural and healthy glow. Guarantees long-lasting hydration without heavy feeling on the skin. 

A popular ingredient in Korean skin care, snail mucin is also known to benefit aging skin, such as restoring vitality to skin and softening the appearance of fine lines. Other key ingredients in this COSRX snail essence include sodium hyaluronate, allantoin, panthenol and arginine, which provide additional hydrating and elasticity-enhancing effects. Suitable for various skin types, including normal skin, oily skin and sensitive skin. 

pH 6.5~1.0. Cruelty-free. Formulated without parabens, sulfates, artificial colors and fragrances, alcohol, mineral oil, essential oils, and silicone. 

If you like this product, try the COSRX Advanced Snail 92 All In One Cream ! 

3.38 fl. oz. / 100 ml

seed_row.title: Pure Fit Cica Calming True Sheet Mask

seed_data.title: Pure Fit Cica Calming True Sheet Mask
seed_data.description:
Moisturized, radiant skin is just a sheet mask away. Soothe sensitive skin in 15 minutes with COSRX Pure Fit Cica Calming True Sheet Mask. Formulated with a pure cica complex extract that delivers a triple calming solution to ease irritation and redness. COSRX 7-CICA Complex is infused with 7 Centella ingredients (Asiaticoside, Asiatic Acid, Madecassic Acid, Madecassoside, Centella Asiatica Extract, Centella Asiatica Leaf Extract, Centella Asiatica Root Extract) to soothe and promote skin recovery. 

Enhance a visibly-glowing complexion with without the need to apply multiple products. This calming sheet mask is made for sensitive, weakened skin in need of intensive soothing care. It’s composed of a light watery texture that absorbs rapidly into the skin to prevent tackiness and protect from over-stimulation of sensitive skin. 

Dermatologically tested to be hypoallergenic and suitable for sensitive skin. Free of artificial fragrances and colors, parabens, sulfates, mineral oil and silicone. 

The pH level of this formula is 6.00 ± 1.00, to ensure optimal potency and support skin health. 

0.71 fl.oz / 21ml

seed_row.title: AHA/BHA Refresh Vitamin C Lip Plumper

seed_data.title: AHA/BHA Refresh Vitamin C Lip Plumper
seed_data.description:
The COSRX AHA/BHA Refresh Vitamin C Lip Plumper volumizes, smooths and hydrates dry and chapped lips. It’s a lightweight gel-cream that can easily be scooped with your fingertips and softly melts on your lips for an effortless, smooth application that turns dry lips hydrated and dewy. 

Formulated with AHA and BHA to exfoliate, as well as Volufiline and Vitamin C to restore lip health and vitality. This volumizing lip plumper can be used daily, whenever and wherever. Simply apply this volumizing lip plumper day and night, whenever needed, to create a smooth yet firm canvas for other lip products. Visibly plumped and fuller lips whenever you need! 

Vegan and Cruelty-free. Formulated without parabens, sulfates, artificial colors and fragrances, animal products, alcohol, and essential oils. 

<!--
br {mso-data-placement:same-cell;}
--> 
0.70 oz / 20g

seed_data.title: The Retinol 0.1 Cream
seed_data.description:
Perfect for first-time retinol users, The Retinol 0.1 Cream is formulated to prevent and correct early signs of aging before they set in. With a gentle but pure concentration of retinol, this cream i ncreases skin elasticity, smooths skin texture, prevents acne & fades scarring and leaves skin moisturized. 

Say goodbye to emerging creases and wrinkles, rough and dull skin, and a loss of skin firming. Formulated with vitamin A to decrease fine lines and wrinkles, panthenol to improve skin's hydration and elasticity, adenosine for skin cell activation and firmness, and super vitamin E to reduce visible signs of aging and damage. 

This product has a pH level of 5.80 ~ 7.80. 

Formulated without fragrance, parabens, sulfates, artificial colors, alcohol, and mineral oil.

20 ml / 0.68 oz

Formulated with vitamin A to decrease fine lines and wrinkles, panthenol to improve skin's hydration and elasticity, adenosine for skin cell activation and firmness, and super vitamin E to reduce visible signs of aging and damage. 

This product has a pH level of 5.80 ~ 7.80. 

Formulated without fragrance, parabens, sulfates, artificial colors, alcohol, and mineral oil.

20 ml / 0.68 oz

seed_data.description:
As part of Cosrx’s coveted new Rx line, the Hyaluronic Acid 3 serum fuses 3% low molecular hyaluronic acid to provide maximum moisture, hydration, and the ultimate skin barrier protection.

seed_data.title: Pure Fit Cica Cream Intense
seed_data.description:
Strengthen your skin barrier with COSRX Pure Fit Cica Cream Intense. Enriched with 61.2% of COSRX’s Pure Fit Cica-7 Complex, which is blended with seven kinds of centella asiatica extracts, plus 1,000ppm of Cica Oil to deliver powerful soothing properties and deep moisturization to sensitive skin. 

This nutrient-replenishing cream has a thick and rich texture but without the greasy finish. It strengthens and repairs skin to restore it back to its original state, revitalizes and rejuvenates the complexion and calms the skin, all while delivering intense hydration. 

Dermatologically tested to be hypoallergenic and suitable for sensitive skin. Free of artificial fragrances and colors, parabens, sulfates, alcohol, mineral oil and silicone. 

The pH level of this formula is 6.00 ± 1.00, to ensure optimal potency and support skin health. 

1.7 fl.oz / 50ml

seed_data.title: The Vitamin C 13 Serum
seed_data.description:
This gentle yet potent vitamin C serum is tailored for sensitive skin, ideal for daily use. Experience its transformative effects as it diminishes blemishes and fades dark spots, unveiling a radiant complexion.

At its core, this serum boasts a concentrated 13% Pure Vitamin C, renowned for its ability to combat discoloration and correct uneven skin tone, delivering visible results.
Enhancing the power of vitamin C is Tocotrienol, with an antioxidant strength up to 50 times greater than Tocopherol. This ingredient strengthens the skin's natural defense, protecting it from environmental aggressors for long-lasting luminosity and vitality.

Completing the formula is a blend of Hyaluronic Acid and Allantoin, working together to hydrate the skin and soothe any irritation, ensuring it remains supple and resilient throughout the day, for optimal skin health.

20 ml / 0.67 fl. oz.

seed_row.title: Full Fit Propolis Nourishing Magnet Sheet Mask (Single)

seed_data.title: Full Fit Propolis Nourishing Magnet Sheet Mask (Single)
seed_data.description:
<!--td {border: 1px solid #cccccc;}br {mso-data-placement:same-cell;}--> 
Crafted to perfection, this sheet mask is infused with the renowned Full Fit Propolis Ampoule, one of Cosrx's best-selling formulas. Enriched with potent ingredients like black bee propolis, honey extract, and royal jelly extract, it offers an unparalleled hydrating and nourishing sensation to your skin.

Designed to revitalize and replenish, this sheet mask delivers intense moisture and nutrients in just 15 minutes. Say goodbye to dull, tired-looking skin as the powerful blend of propolis and honey works its magic, leaving your complexion radiant and refreshed. Whether you're combating dryness or simply pampering yourself, the Cosrx Full Fit Propolis Nourishing Magnet Sheet Mask is your go-to solution for a luminous, dewy glow. 

<!--td {border: 1px solid #cccccc;}br {mso-data-placement:same-cell;}--> 
21 ml / 0.71 fl oz 

<!---->

seed_data.title: Propolis Light Cream
seed_data.description:
Transform skin from dry and dehydrated to supple and glowing with this concentrated lightweight gel moisturizer. Cosrx Propolis Light Cream features 65% of black bee pro-police complex of propolis extract, honey and royal jelly extract, which are known for their antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The ingredients work together to heal, nourish and deeply moisturize skin. 

This formula is good for dehydrated and dull skin types, and is free of artificial fragrance, parabens, sulfates, artificial colors, mineral oil, essential oils, and silicone.

2.20 fl oz / 65 ml

seed_data.title: Acne Pimple Master Patch
seed_data.description:
The COSRX Acne Pimple Master Patch has a uniquely developed hydrocolloid material that effectively extracts impurities. This material creates a moist environment, which makes the healing process faster. 

Hailed by Korean skin care fans as a holy grail product for acne treatment, these pimple patches protect from secondary infections and further swelling. Available in various sizes, the hydrocolloid acne patch covers the affected area and absorbs excess sebum for easy and effective blemish control. They adhere to the skin strongly and do magic overnight and throughout the day! This spot treatment speeds up the healing process of the pimple and helps prevent acne scars. Apply the pimple patch to clean skin before applying any essence or moisturizer. The patches come in a resealable pouch and sterilized double packaging. 

Vegan. Formulated without parabens, sulfates, artificial colors and fragrances, animal products, alcohol, essential oils, and silicone. 

Each pack contains 24 patches.

seed_row.title: Advanced Snail 92 All In One Cream

seed_data.title: Advanced Snail 92 All In One Cream
seed_data.description:
COSRX's best-selling cream is now available in a tube! 

The COSRX Advanced Snail 92 All in One Cream is a lightweight moisturizer that nourishes, replenishes, and plumps the skin with moisture. This lightweight cream is enriched with 92% snail secretion filtrate that drenches the skin with needed moisture, helping to repair skin damage and promote healing, but without feeling sticky. 

This everyday multi-solution cream glides onto the skin and revives skin radiance. It also helps to desensitize the skin after breakouts like rosacea. Increased moisture diminishes fine lines and wrinkles, leading to a healthier, younger look. Use at the last step of skin care regimen. 

pH 5.5~1.0. Cruelty-free. Formulated without parabens, sulfates, artificial colors and fragrances, alcohol, mineral oil, and essential oils. 

Type: Jar, Tube 

3.52 oz/100g

seed_data.title: BHA Blackhead Power Liquid
seed_data.description:
COSRX BHA Blackhead Power Liquid is a highly effective chemical exfoliator that refines the look of enlarged pores and leaves skin brighter. 

Formulated with 4% BHA, this concentrated toner visibly diminishes enlarged pores and dead skin cells. Contains natural BHA ingredients like willow bark water to maximize benefits without irritation. BHA deeply penetrates pores, helps clear clogged pores, and gently exfoliates dead skin cells, giving the skin its natural glow. This product helps remove excess sebum and blackheads so you can find healthy and hydrated skin. 

pH 4.85~1.0. Vegan and Cruelty-free. Formulated without parabens, sulfates, artificial colors and fragrances, animal products, alcohol, mineral oil, essential oils, and silicone. 

<!--
br {mso-data-placement:same-cell;}
--> 
3.38 fl.oz/100ml

seed_data.title: Advanced Snail Peptide Eye Cream
seed_data.description:
This double functioning eye cream contains snail secretion filtrate which moisturizes, protects and helps rejuvenate the eye area. The COSRX Advanced Snail Peptide Eye Cream is a lightweight hydrator that brightens, firms and depuffs with 72% snail mucin and anti-aging peptides. This multifunctional eye cream moisturizes, nourishes and brightens the delicate eye area. 

It contains snail secretion filtrate and 5 different types of peptides to restore elasticity and reduce the appearance of fine lines. Niacinamide allows for collagen production to brighten dark circles. This fast-absorbing eye cream comes in a light texture that’s suitable for all ages. Housed in an airless pump container to maintain optimal product quality and enable hygienic use with less waste. 

pH 6.0~1.0. Cruelty-free. Formulated without parabens, sulfates, artificial colors and fragrances, alcohol, mineral oil, essential oils, and silicone. 

<!--
br {mso-data-placement:same-cell;}
--> 
0.85 fl.oz/25ml

pH 6.0~1.0. Cruelty-free. Formulated without parabens, sulfates, artificial colors and fragrances, alcohol, mineral oil, essential oils, and silicone. 

<!--
br {mso-data-placement:same-cell;}
--> 
0.85 fl.oz/25ml

seed_data.title: Advanced Snail Hydrogel Eye Patch
seed_data.description:
Restore vitality to tired eyes with the COSRX Advanced Snail Hydrogel Eye Patch. This lightweight patch is formulated to deliver rich moisture to replenish delicate under-eye skin in need of intensive care and nourishment. Infused with Advanced Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence, this hydrogel eye patch hydrates and plumps the under-eye. The eye mask consists of two sizes - small and large to soothe and hydrate the skin with a perfect fit. 

The hydrogel eye patch contains 20,400ppm of snail secretion filtrate, which delivers rich nutrition to the skin and strengthens skin elasticity. Contains 2% niacinamide to refine and brighten skin for a clear complexion. The Honeycomb-patterned texture adheres tightly to the skin, effectively delivering moisture and active ingredients to dry and dull skin. Treat and care for smile lines, wrinkles around the eyes, and forehead wrinkles. 

pH 6.42~1.0. Cruelty-free. Formulated without parabens, sulfates, artificial colors and fragrances, alcohol, mineral oil, essential oils, and silicone. 

60 patches / 3.17 oz.

seed_data.title: Vitamin E Vitalizing Sunscreen SPF 50+
seed_data.description:
**This product is Over-The-Counter (OTC) registered. 

*This product is not available to customers outside of the U.S. due to customs regulations. 

Strong and effective sun protection without the heavy white cast. Block UV rays with BROAD SPECTRUM SPF 50+, control sebum with silica and moisturize, reduce visible signs of aging and skin damage with antioxidant Vitamin E. Cocoa extract prevents dryness and cotton extract absorbs and minimizes oil. 

COSRX Vitamin E Vitalizing Sunscreen leaves skin dewy and moisturized, while protecting against sun and free radical damage. Blends and absorbs into any skin type and tone, it’s perfect to wear alone or under makeup! 

Dermatologically tested to be hypoallergenic and suitable for sensitive skin. Free of artificial colors, parabens, alcohol, sulfates, and mineral oil. The pH level of this formula is 5.50 ~ 8.00 , to ensure optimal potency and support skin health. 

1.69 fl. Oz / 50mL 

*This product is not available to customers outside of the U.S. due to customs regulations.
